typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		{Adj Consequence Model Escalation Date} as string,
		VIIDWFGUID as string,
		{VIIDWFGUID + Path} as string,
		JAVA_PATH_ID as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: false,
	validateSchema: true,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	format: 'parquet') ~> CMAdjust
CMAdjust derive(Import_date = currentDate(),
		{VIIDWFGUID + Path} = replace({VIIDWFGUID + Path}, ' ', '')) ~> CleanblanksVIIGUIDPATH
CleanblanksVIIGUIDPATH sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	format: 'parquet',
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	saveOrder: 10000,
	mapColumn(
		Adj_Consequence_Model_Escalation_Date = {Adj Consequence Model Escalation Date},
		VIIDWFGUID,
		VIIDWFGUID___Path = {VIIDWFGUID + Path},
		Java_Path = JAVA_PATH_ID,
		Import_date
	)) ~> OLEDBDestination
